item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in ordinary execution mode, treated the three prior onboarding changes as mixed operational context rather than a repeated-local-repair brake signal, and directly provided a practical ordered rollout plan. It did not invoke triage, Anti-Spiral/3L5S, or over-methodize the request."}
